source: Resources/portfolio-risk-review/portfolio-risk-methodology.md — 'Simulation Assumptions' default annual volatilities and crisis-correlation notes, applied to JodSa Investments' MVP asset classes. These are illustrative proxy inputs, NOT fitted to a real historical return series — every consumer must tag values derived from this file [JUDG-PROXY].

us_large_cap.label: US large-cap / broad market index (VOO/VTI-like, S&P 500 / total-market proxy)

us_tech_growth.label: US mega-cap growth / tech / Nasdaq-heavy (QQQ-like, or concentrated single-name growth)

thai_set.label: Thai SET single-names / broad Thai equity

thai_fund_generic.label: Generic Thai mutual fund, equity-leaning, strategy not otherwise classified

broad_equity_selloff.label: Broad equity sell-off (GFC / COVID-style risk-off across risk assets)

risk_asset_crash.label: Concentrated risk-asset crash (crypto / high-beta led, milder broad-equity drag)
